# PKCS #12 Import Item Keys

**API Collection**

Recognized the dictionary keys returned by an import operation.

## Overview

These keys appear in the dictionary returned by the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecPKCS12Import(_:_:_:)] function.

## Constants

- **kSecImportItemLabel**: Item label.
- **kSecImportItemKeyID**: Key ID.
- **kSecImportItemTrust**: Trust management object.
- **kSecImportItemCertChain**: Certificate list.
- **kSecImportItemIdentity**: Identity object.
title: PKCS #12 Import Item Keys
